3007650.name: Rise of Realms
3007650.description:
We have taken our playtest version back to the garage for a tune-up and will bring it back soon, packed with a ton of new features and content. Stay tuned.
Features:

  • Battle for dominion over the lands alone or with friends.

    Tactical turn-based hex grid gameplay. Quick auto-chess battlefields for up to 7 armies.

  • Choose one of several playable races and recruit powerful heroes to lead your armies.

    Unique hero and unit rosters for each.

  • Explore a rich 3D game world, where each faction spreads its unique biome.

    Includes custom made modular castles and an expansive list of faction-specific upgradeable buildings on the map.

  • Collect powerful items and cast spells with devastating effects to wipe out enemy armies.

  • Deep RPG progression systems allow specialization in a myriad of ways.

    Each playable hero has a unique combination of 3 different talent trees.

  • Random map generation and quest systems ensure no two game sessions feel the same.

    All maps are randomly generated and populated with the required obstacles and objectives.

  • Lovingly hand-crafted by a small team.

    No AI generated models, textures, artwork, music or code. At present, only includes AI generated voice lines, which are still post-processed by humans and we plan to substitute them for voice actors in the future.
3007650.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 瑞典语, 土耳其语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
